case_title: JAMES TALIAFERRO VS. LIBERTY PROPERTIES GROUP, LLC

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$25.00);[MALCOLM XIANG - AGENT OF SERVICE] SERVED DEC-07-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LIBERTY PROPERTIES GROUP, LLC
REMARK: EXHIBITS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO ORDER FILED ON 8/4/2025. (SEE MANAGER FOR ORDER.)
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. BOTH PARTIES' EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE SYLVIA HUSING, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,313.00 FILED BY TALIAFERRO, JAMES AS TO DEFENDANT LIBERTY PROPERTIES GROUP, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-17-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER DISMISSED. NO FURTHER ACTION TAKEN BY THE COURT.
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT LIBERTY PROPERTIES GROUP, LLC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-16-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-26-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JAMES TALIAFERRO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LIBERTY PROPERTIES GROUP, LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY KW CHENG. PARTIES PARTICIPATED IN SMALL CLAIMS MEDIATION WITH THE HASTINGS MEDIATION CLINIC. AN AGREEMENT WAS REACHED. IN NO APPEARENCES AT THE NEXT COURT HEARING, THIS MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL JUDGE DID NOT GRANT DEFENDANTS REQUEST FOR MAY 2024. JUDGE SET A HEARING DATE FOR FEB-16-2024 A 1:30 PM IN DEPARTMENT 506 5TH FLOOR.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-17-2024 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO FEB-16-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
